Amina Okafor

Program Director, Health Bridge Nigeria

Amina leads a community health org. She browses public solicitations and submits responses.

Amina Okafor

Browse public solicitations

Clean card grid with type badges, deadlines, and scale — easy to scan for relevant opportunities

✨ AI Quality ★★★☆☆ (3/5)

Overall: 3/5 (weakest: App Page & Slide). A: Content 4/5 — three distinct real solicitations covering RFP and EOI. B: App Page 3/5 — functional, no custom polish beyond badges. C: Screenshot 4/5 — well framed. D: Slide 3/5 — 2NIBA card metadata crams awkwardly. E: Demo Ready 4/5 — usable with one caveat (EOI card places program name above title, unusual vs RFP cards). Fix: [CODE] normalize card header layout across solicitation types.

Amina Okafor

Read solicitation details

Criteria shown upfront so applicants know exactly how they'll be scored before writing a word

✨ AI Quality ★★★★☆ (4/5)

Overall: 4/5. A: Content 4/5 — rich criteria with 'what makes a strong response' guides. B: App Page 4/5 — good hierarchy, polished criteria cards. C: Screenshot 4/5. D: Slide 4/5 — narration validated. E: Demo Ready 4/5 with one caveat — every question is tagged 'Optional' on seed data. Fix: [DATA] set required=true on the seed CHW solicitation questions; verify label inconsistency 'SCOPE' vs 'Scope of Work'.

Sarah Chen

Manager dashboard

At-a-glance view of all solicitations with status, deadline, and how many responses each has

✨ AI Quality ★★★☆☆ (3/5)

Overall: 3/5. A: Content 3/5 — EOI has 0 responses (empty state visible). B: App Page 3/5 — functional table. C: Screenshot 4/5. D: Slide 3/5 — narration works but table is sparse with 2 rows. E: Demo Ready 3/5 — passable with narration. Fix: [DATA] seed at least one EOI response to avoid the empty state.

Sarah Chen

Create a solicitation

Dynamic question builder with inline criteria editing; AI-generated evaluation criteria via 'Generate with AI' button

✨ AI Quality ★★★☆☆ (3/5)

Overall: 3/5. A: Content 4/5 — all 4 questions and 4 criteria hydrated after bug fix. B: App Page 3/5 — dynamic rows functional but criterion headers use generic 'Criterion 1/2/3' instead of actual names. C: Screenshot 3/5 — very tall page. D: Slide 4/5 — narration now validated post-fix. E: Demo Ready 4/5. Fix: [CODE] use criterion name as row header once entered. NOTE: this session fixed the edit-form hydration bug where existing_questions_json/existing_criteria_json were HTML-escaped inside <script type="text/plain">, breaking JSON.parse. Now using Django's json_script filter.

Submit a response

Criteria shown alongside each question so respondents know what reviewers are looking for

✨ AI Quality ★★★☆☆ (3/5)

Overall: 3/5. A: Content 3/5 — empty answer textareas; same 'Technical Expertise (25%)' scoring guide duplicated next to Q1 and Q2 (both linked to it). B: App Page 4/5 — nice column layout with criteria beside questions. C: Screenshot 4/5. D: Slide 4/5 — narration validated. E: Demo Ready 3/5 — blank textareas weaken impact. Fix: [DATA] pre-fill draft answers for a stronger demo; [CODE] collapse duplicate criterion blocks when multiple questions link to the same criterion.

Review all responses

All responses in one view with latest review scores — easy to compare applicants

✨ AI Quality ★★★★☆ (4/5)

Overall: 4/5. A: Content 4/5 — four real orgs with diverse names (Community Health Partners — Ghana, Sahel Community Health Partners, Health Bridge Nigeria, Mwangaza Health Initiative), one awarded at 85/100, real contact emails. Updated 'Demo User' to 'Kwame Asante' mid-session. B: App Page 4/5 — clean table with per-row actions. C: Screenshot 4/5. D: Slide 4/5 — narration validated. E: Demo Ready 4/5. Fix: [CODE] 'AI Comparative Review' button teased but not demonstrated — add inline preview or modal.

James Mwangi

Score a response

Structured scoring against defined criteria eliminates subjective bias

✨ AI Quality ★★★★☆ (4/5)

Overall: 4/5. A: Content 4/5 — Health Bridge Nigeria's response has substantive detail (6 states, 4,200 CHWs, multilingual training). B: App Page 4/5 — clean per-question cards with inline 1-10 score inputs. C: Screenshot 4/5 — tall but complete. D: Slide 4/5 — narration validated. E: Demo Ready 4/5 with one caveat — 'Technical Expertise (25%)' criterion text duplicates next to Q1 and Q2. Fix: [CODE] dedupe criterion display when same criterion links to multiple questions.

James Mwangi

Award a grantee

One click from review to award — budget allocated and org assigned automatically

✨ AI Quality ★★★☆☆ (3/5)

Overall: 3/5. A: Content 3/5 — Award Budget field empty (placeholder 'e.g. 500000'); sparse 2-field form. B: App Page 4/5 — clean card with trophy icon, good confirmation banner. C: Screenshot 4/5. D: Slide 3/5 — narration says 'one click, automatic' but form requires manual org_id and budget entry. E: Demo Ready 3/5. Fix: [SPEC] update narration to acknowledge manual entry; [CODE] pre-fill org_id + budget from the review if the reviewer recommended Approve.

Issues Found

  • ⚠ Scene 1: EOI card places 'Baobab Nutrition Initiative' program name above title — inconsistent with RFP cards.
  • ⚠ Scene 2: Every question labeled 'Optional' — seed data has required=true but display shows Optional.
  • ⚠ Scene 4: FIXED mid-session: edit-form Alpine hydration failed due to HTML-escaped JSON in <script type="text/plain"> tags. Now using Django json_script filter.
  • ⚠ Scene 5: Criterion 'Technical Expertise (25%)' scoring guide duplicates verbatim next to Q1 and Q2.
  • ⚠ Scene 8: Narration claims 'one click, automatic' but form requires manual org_id + budget entry.
